commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a shared TUI session-list policy, applies bounded recency and search-based lookups to TUI session listing paths, forwards all Gateway session-list filters, and updates docs, tests, and the changelog.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was run because this review is read-only. Source inspection of current main does show the TUI picker and refresh/restore paths omit the new bounds while requesting session-list data that can hydrate transcript previews.
